files.notes: This file contains four sequential Guide Lessons for June, covering Theology/Testimony, Work/Business, Literature (George Santayana), and Social Service (childhood problems). Each lesson has distinct subject matter and question sections. The file ends with advertisement content that should be excluded from the lessons.
